email.verify.title: Verify your email
email.verify.intro: Confirm this email address to finish setting up your account.
email.verify.instructions: Open this secure link to verify your email:
email.verify.outro: If the button does not work, paste the verification token into the verification form.
email.verify.warning: If you did not create this account, you can ignore this email.
email.password_reset.title: Reset your password
email.password_reset.intro: We received a request to reset the password for your account.
email.password_reset.instructions: Open this secure link to choose a new password:
email.password_reset.outro: This password reset link expires in 30 minutes and can only be used once.
email.password_reset.warning: If you did not request a password reset, you can ignore this email.
email.outdated.title: App update requested
email.outdated.intro: A user marked this app as outdated and included the following details.
email.outdated.instructions: Open the store backend to review this app:
email.outdated.outro: Publishing an approved newer version clears the outdated marks automatically.
email.test.title: SMTP delivery is ready
email.test.intro: This is a test email from your MiaoMiao private store.
email.test.outro: If you received this message, SMTP delivery is configured correctly.
